title: Kurdish Ackee Crumble German Style
description: A twist on traditional German desserts, using the unique flavor of ackee and a crunchy crumble topping.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together ackee, granulated sugar, flour, and cinnamon.
Transfer the mixture to a 9-inch pie dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together softened butter and rolled oats. Add flaky sea salt and mix until crumbly.
Spread the crumble mixture evenly over the ackee mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the filling is set.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Serve warm, topped with additional crumble topping if desired.
